# Amazon Chronos-Bolt Tiny weights

Bundled for offline use on networks that cannot access Hugging Face.

- Model: `amazon/chronos-bolt-tiny`
- Source: https://huggingface.co/amazon/chronos-bolt-tiny
- Revision: `a0e552de83495b5c28c14c71c374f3e33280b340`
- License: Apache-2.0
- Weight format: `safetensors`
- `model.safetensors` SHA-256: `75068728d376d2bec670379eeef4bfb4d24c0cfe24d957451f8d19b447030a32`

The weights and configuration are unmodified from the pinned model revision.
